old_value: {"id":"smallhold-ncxc","title":"Strip CSRF token machinery if present, use SameSite cookies","description":"If the OAuth authorize form has hand-rolled CSRF token generation/validation, strip it. SameSite=Strict on the session cookie provides browser-native CSRF protection. Or delegate to Caddy/WAF. The in-memory token store doesn't survive restarts. Reference: gaja commit 3cf3634.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-07-19T22:39:18.720434672Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-19T22:39:18.720434672Z","labels":["ponytail","infra-delegation"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"smallhold-ncxc","depends_on_id":"smallhold-gsed","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-19T23:04:17.230349205Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: No CSRF token machinery exists. App uses stateless Bearer auth, no cookies. OAuth form requires admin password, not vulnerable to CSRF.
